description: Real-time exploit-exposure risk check for EVM wallets, paid per query via x402 (USDC on Base).
name: io.github.wallettriage/wallettriage-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Private key (0x + 64 hex) of a dedicated low-balance session wallet that signs gasless x402 USDC payments on Base. Never use your main key.
environmentVariables.name: EVM_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: WalletTriage API base URL. Defaults to the public production gateway; set to http://localhost:4021 for local development.
environmentVariables.name: GATEWAY_URL

environmentVariables.description: Safety cap: refuse any x402 payment requirement above this many atomic USDC units (6 decimals). Default 100000 = US$0.10.
environmentVariables.name: MAX_PAYMENT_ATOMIC

environmentVariables.description: Default chain when the caller omits one: eth, base, polygon, arbitrum, optimism, bsc.
environmentVariables.name: DEFAULT_SCAN_CHAIN

title: WalletTriage
